name: fleetmind-mcp-workspace
description: Workspace for Vehicle Sales & Telematics MCP system

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix mcp-servers/vehicle-sales && npm install --prefix mcp-servers/vehicle-telematics && npm run build --prefix mcp-servers/vehicle-sales && npm run build --prefix mcp-servers/vehicle-telematics && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build:mcps: npm run build --prefix mcp-servers/vehicle-sales && npm run build --prefix mcp-servers/vehicle-telematics
scripts.check:mcps: npm run check --prefix mcp-servers/vehicle-sales && npm run check --prefix mcp-servers/vehicle-telematics
scripts.check: npm run check:mcps && npm run check --prefix backend && npm run check --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:mcps && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npm run build:mcps && npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
